accelerator 0.7.1

Convert an interval to a dataframe

Source: R/interval2Dataframe.R
interval2Dataframe.Rd

Parses lubridate::interval objects or a nested list of intervals into a standardized start/end data frame. Can optionally assign custom identifier columns.

Usage

interval2Dataframe(intervals, .id = c())

Arguments

intervals

A lubridate interval vector or list containing intervals.

.id

An optional character vector specifying column names to dynamically bind when unnesting lists.

Value

A data frame containing start and end representations of the provided intervals.

On this page
